steps.title: Isolate the y term
steps.content:
Rewrite the equation so $y$ is by itself:
$$42x-6y=-28$$
$$-6y=-42x-28$$

steps.title: Read the slope
steps.content:
Divide every term by $-6$:
$$y=7x+\frac{14}{3}$$In slope-intercept form, the slope is the coefficient of $x$, which is $7$. The answer is D.
